C
08:03
Crypto Rug Muncher
Promoting projects like BNB and Aster is the literal antithesis of why crypto was started to begin with. It doesn't matter if someone is being paid to shill them or if they’re just following the crowd; if you support a project where the founders control over 60% of the supply, you aren't pushing for decentralized finance. You are pushing a single entity. You are advocating for a single point of control that functions as a single point of failure.

Consistency in our ideological beliefs as a space will be one of the only things that is going to be able to keep the barking dogs at bay and if we are lucky, prevent us from being permanently co-opted into the very systems we were trying to escape. It doesn't help that a good many among us are perfectly fine handing the keys over to CZ without question and encouraging others to do the same. This is the original sin of modern crypto: trading sovereignty for an easy centralized shortcut and many in the space just accepting it without much consideration. If we passively accept losing the "De" in DeFi, we’ve already lost the war without a shot even being fired.

Stop settling for an unregistered bank with a different logo. Start demanding and supporting projects that at least attempt to live by the original ethos of why this space exists in the first place. Take the time and learn how to properly self-custody your crypto. Satoshi would hate a site like Binance and the centralized projects they've created, and if the space had a bit of backbone, the rest of us would too.
❤ 2

Crypto Rug Muncher
For anyone who hasn't checked it out, our Github for the $CRM / $cryptorugmunch project is live and regularly being updated. Please have a look:

https://github.com/CryptoRugMunch

If you would like to try the tools we have built for yourself or see how they work, please be sure to join our community Telegram chat:

https://t.me/+z7im61GChWkyZGIx

Thank you to the community for sticking with us as we continue to build and improve on what's been built already and we move forward with our goal of building out the Bloomberg Terminal of Shitcoins that will eventually leave the scammers with no where to hide.

The Github as well as our tools and plans for our tokens are not in their final form quite yet but as we've done throughout this project we are building in the open for all to see. If you are tired of getting rugged by dodgy KOLs and bundle scammers, this is a great time to get positioned in a project that is actually working to do something about it.

The market cap on $CRM has increased by 1/3 in the last week as folks start to realize what we are building will eventually bare fruit and help many in the space to stay safe. Grab a bag, join the community, and let’s work together to make the space a better place to be.
❤ 3 👀 2
C
10:21
Crypto Rug Muncher
Despite the constant stream of obituaries pronouncing meme coins dead and gone, they’re still very much here—heavily traded, still popular, with some even thriving now while the rest of the market tanks.

Unlike the "professionals" in this industry who are quietly hoping memes just go away, we see the writing on the wall. We aren't interested in wishing memes away; we’re actively working to make trading them much safer than it is today.

We’re shipping tools like our contract analysis bot and our AI agent @MarcusRugIntel to give traders the actual data they need to make a rigged game a little less rigged. We aren't here to play referee on what you buy, that's your business, but we are here to make sure you have a fairer shot by giving you the data and detailed analysis you need to read contract red flags so that you can know the truth about a token before you get rugged and not after.

If you’re tired of being the exit liquidity to serial meme coin scammers, it’s time to stop flying blind. Use and shape the tech we’re building to help level the playing field and to tighten up your analysis on an asset class that is likely here to stay.

Get positioned in a project that is trying to build safety and accountability into the meme coin game. Get $CRM and help us make the trenches a better place to be.

Crypto Rug Muncher
The Trump family-backed and World Liberty Financial $WLFI-owned $USD1 has lost its peg to the dollar, currently trading about a quarter-cent below its target. Interestingly, and whether this is significant remains to be seen, but recent reports indicate that Binance holds 87% of the coin's total circulating supply.
C
22:53
Crypto Rug Muncher
This wasn't a coordinated attack. $USD1 de-pegged, in part, because Eric Trump was frantically deleting tweets about the token in real-time. If anything, that panicked backtrack did more to tank the price than any external factor could have ever hoped to.

Whether or not ZachXBT exposes the insider trading at $WLFI in the next few days is secondary; the writing is already on the wall and widely known. From the $TRUMP and $MELANIA coins to the $WLFI launch and the $BONK partnership, every project the Trump family touches follows the same playbook: insider-manipulated and controlled garbage designed to extract maximum value from retail to line the pockets of the First Family.

We don't need an investigation to confirm what the entire crypto space has witnessed every single day since they arrived. The First Family's day of crypto reckoning will eventually come, whether it happens next week or next year. You can't build a sustainable future on a foundation of pure manipulation, corruption, and greed—eventually, the floor is going to give out, whether someone helps it along or not.

https://x.com/worldlibertyfi/status/2025951491287089384

Crypto Rug Muncher
This isn't just one company; it’s the entire "top" of the crypto food chain. They’ve been corrupted into thinking they’re untouchable just because their guy is in the White House and they helped get him there. The space has become a playground for jerkoff insiders to rig the board while gaslighting retail investors who are finally seeing through the facade.

They’ve operated with zero fear because there’ve been zero consequences, but the chickens always come home to roost. The industry is just as shortsighted as ever for not considering that their corruption today is exactly what will kneecap them into strict regulation under a different regime and likely set the industry back years in the process.

Crypto Rug Muncher

C
02:36
Crypto Rug Muncher
Why didn’t @Polymarket include itself in the list of possibilities? Better yet, Zach should throw a wrench in this market completely and expose several of the known insider-rigged market manipulators who are prominent on this list.

The crypto space very much needs a serious house cleaning if it ever wants retail to return in significant numbers or even to be taken seriously again. Turns out, it's a lot more profitable to be corrupt than it is to be a neutral operator and do things by the book and still make your money. The only way many of these companies and the industry are going to stop what they are doing behind the scenes and under the table is by being exposed and made to comply with regulation.

Right now, it’s the fox guarding the henhouse, and that very much needs to change soon.

03:33
Crypto Rug Muncher
CZ at this point has become the caricature of a stereotypical, bottom-tier shitcoin dev, the kind who is heavy with the ban hammer in Telegram, regularly abuses and gaslights his community, and calls every legitimate concern "FUD," all while secretly dumping from the hundreds of side wallets he claims not to control.

In most other projects, the community would have sent him packing long ago. But in this token, the community is trapped as his hostage because he’s bundled the supply. They know he is completely toxic, but they’re also terrified that if they push him toward the door, he’ll just end up rugging them completely on the way out.

CZ has literally become that dev, just scaled to a global level. Instead of a $50k liquidity pool, he’s holding the entire market hostage. We aren't so much investors at the moment and are more like passengers in a car being driven by an overconfident jerk who would rather crash into a wall than admit he lost the map, all while trying to convince us that if we die it's our fault for being in the car he is driving.

Just low-rent behavior from the leader of the world's largest crypto exchange that everyone in the space is being made to endure. Feels bad man.

15:27
Crypto Rug Muncher
Let’s talk about the USD1 depeg and the absolute circus surrounding it.

The timeline on this is a joke: Last year, Trump grants CZ a presidential pardon. Fast forward to earlier this month, and it’s revealed that Binance is sitting on nearly 90% of the Trump family’s stablecoin supply.

Now, CZ expects everyone to believe there was zero quid pro quo here?

This is a guy who is legally barred from being his own company's CEO because he was convicted of enabling money laundering. Yet, we’re supposed to think Binance independently decided that a brand-new project, one run by the President’s sons, was such a good investment that they needed to control almost the entire supply at the exact moment the pardon was being signed?

The idea that CZ didn't push anyone at Binance to make this deal is likely a fairy tale. If he’s influencing these moves, he is effectively running the company and treating court orders like mere suggestions.

Owning the vast majority of the USD1 supply has allowed CZ to go back to doing what he’s always done: manipulating markets while larping on X and playing the fool. He dodges any and all criticism directed towards him by claiming he doesn't run Binance anymore, while simultaneously taking credit for their successes whenever it suits him. It’s infuriating to watch for anyone with a brain.

They aren't even trying to hide it anymore. They are doing blatant corruption in broad daylight, betting that we're all too jaded to notice or care. It’s no wonder USD1 is on shaky ground and depegging. The token isn't a financial product; it’s a corruption machine that has tied CZ and the Trumps together at the hip.

19:26
Amaro De Abreu
To the people who were unfazed by yesterday, I salute you. The OG's know and can clearly see we are building something that is not going to be affected by hype or price. Our tools and our mission is decoupled from the market, and our positioning allows us to do what we do, no matter how many fast money degens come and go. The core team is here to stay, solid, and invested heart and soul. We have achieved more in 6 weeks than most real companies can achieve in 6 months, with no funding, no KOL'S, no bull. Just honest work, protecting people, and making the best in class software we can. I have a positive update, I will provide more details soon, but I will say one thing: Revolut's UK CFO is reviewing a proposal I made to white label our risk engine into their crypto trading section. Aka live portfolio health of all the tokens you hold in Revolut. Our Phantom Wallet portfolio health score is something he really liked, and we are diving deep into the tech and commercials. I can't say if anything will come of it yet, but I am doing my utmost to leverage my real world networks everywhere I can, and the feedback from non crypto people has been fantastic. Our main issue to keep hammering at is user acquisition, so will be doing a ton on that in the next month. Appreciate all you lovely, solid folks helping and supporting, it means the world. Every little bit on X helps, and I am reviewing other channels we will market into as well to assist us in getting more users. While the sosana voting mechanism could help us a lot, I am still mindful of true and organic growth, and operating lean, bootstrapping some amazing that will speak for it self. I have been contributing for a total of 7 weeks now, and I think we can all clearly see we are unique and doing something altruistic in the crypto space. And while KOL'S shill and farm on socials, we just get down to business, on the tech and educational sides. @CryptoRugMunch has been our Colour Sargent, flying our colours and spitting in the eyes of the scammers every day and educating the masses, @Hr_Lihtenberg has been paramount to enabling us to move in this new direction. And each and every one of you here, active and fighting the good fight, you know who you are, and you have my personal thanks and respect. 🫡
❤

00:16
Crypto Rug Muncher
Binance continues to be in the news for all the wrong reasons. According to reporting by the Wall Street Journal, internal compliance investigators at the exchange caught over a billion dollars in crypto casually flowing right through their platform to sanctioned Iranian entities. But instead of fixing the massive gaping hole in their system, Binance executives allegedly buried the findings and fired the staff who flagged the transactions.

Here is the the worst part. This cover up allegedly went down right around the time Changpeng Zhao was securing his presidential pardon from Donald Trump for his previous anti money laundering crimes. CZ was getting his slate wiped clean by the White House, and meanwhile, his exchange is busy firing the very people trying to stop the very crimes he just got pardoned for. Binance is supposed to be operating under a strict three year DOJ and five year FinCEN monitorship after pleading guilty and paying billions in fines, yet another massive wave of illicit funds managed to slip right through the cracks.

CZ and the corporate PR machine are out in full force on X spinning their usual fairy tales, trying to paint these whistleblowers as disgruntled employees fired for poor performance, but their story just doesn't make any sense. The automated compliance filters completely failed to stop bad actors from washing a billion dollars, but the human investigators who caught it are the ones getting the axe. Management clearly was prioritizing hiding the paper trail over cleaning up the platform. If regulators ever bother to do their jobs and look at the internal documents and realize this was straight up retaliation, that massive plea deal could potentially go up in flames.

While I’ve been busy digging into all this Binance drama the last few days, our community coin $CRM just quietly broke $400k market cap again.

It seems like the broader community is beginning to take note. Our project is the exact opposite of the insider-manipulated garbage I regularly expose on this page. No insiders. No paid KOLs. No bullshit. Just a fully community-backed and controlled project that wants to make crypto a better place to be.

We have registered our project as an LLC in the US state of Wyoming and actively building tools to protect retail investors from the predatory scams running rampant in crypto right now. We have already launched our contract and wallet analysis tool as well as our AI agent @MarcusRugIntel, and we are working daily to improve them to be the best scam detection tools on the market.

If you want to support a fairer and more transparent crypto space, back a project that is building it. Get $CRM.

08:35
Amaro De Abreu
🗳️ Vote $CRM on Sosana

$CRM has officially been accepted for nomination again.

This round matters.

For those unfamiliar, Sosana is a Solana-based voting platform where a limited number of tokens compete every two weeks for ecosystem exposure and treasury-backed support.

$CRM has now been accepted three rounds in a row.

⸻

🚀 Why This Is Important

If $CRM wins:

• 📣 Exposure to the broader Sosana community
• 🏦 Sosana treasury purchases $CRM (funded by platform tax revenue)
• 🎁 Voters receive a share of the purchased tokens

This creates:
Visibility + Buy Pressure + Community Incentives aligned

Last round, we missed by only 10 votes.
Meanwhile, $CRM has climbed nearly 40% in the past 24 hours.

Momentum is building. This is how we amplify it.

⸻

🗳️ How To Vote for $CRM (Step-by-Step)

✅ Step 1: Connect Your Wallet

Go to: dapp.sosana.io
• Click Connect Wallet
• Use Phantom, Solflare, or any supported Solana wallet

⸻

✅ Step 2: Complete Onboarding

You’ll see two options:
• Founder Program
• KYC Option

👉 For voting, you only need the KYC option
• Cost: $10 worth of $SOSANA tokens
• Founder Program is optional

⸻

✅ Step 3: Complete KYC

• Follow in-app verification
• This unlocks voting eligibility

⸻

✅ Step 4: Hold Required Tokens

To vote, you must:
• Hold $50 worth of $SOSANA tokens
• Keep them in your wallet for the full 48-hour voting window

⚠️ Tokens only need to be held during the voting period.

⸻

✅ Step 5: Cast Your Vote

• Go to the Voting section
• Select $CRM
• Submit

⸻

🎁 If $CRM Wins

• Return to the app
• Claim your airdrop allocation directly from the platform

⸻

We were 10 votes short last time.

If you’re holding $CRM, this is a simple way to support the ecosystem, increase exposure, and participate in potential upside.

Let’s finish this round strong.
❤‍🔥

If you’re a member of the $CRM or $Sosana communities and want to help out, please jump in and participate. It’s a great chance to help us grow while building bridges with another project that’s trying to do things the right way for their community too. Details below.

🗳️ Vote $CRM on Sosana

$CRM has officially been accepted for nomination again.

This round matters.

For those unfamiliar, Sosana is a Solana-based voting platform where a limited number of tokens compete every two weeks for ecosystem exposure and treasury-backed support.

$CRM has now been accepted three rounds in a row.

⸻

🚀 Why This Is Important

If $CRM wins:

• 📣 Exposure to the broader Sosana community
• 🏦 Sosana treasury purchases $CRM (funded by platform tax revenue)
• 🎁 Voters receive a share of the purchased tokens

This creates:

Visibility + Buy Pressure + Community Incentives aligned

Last round, we missed by only 10 votes.
Meanwhile, $CRM has climbed nearly 40% in the past 24 hours.

Momentum is building. This is how we amplify it.

🗳️ How To Vote for $CRM (Step-by-Step)

✅ Step 1: Connect Your Wallet

• Click Connect Wallet
• Use Phantom, Solflare, or any supported Solana wallet

⸻

• Founder Program
• KYC Option

👉 For voting, you only need the KYC option
• Cost: $10 worth of $SOSANA tokens

• This unlocks voting eligibility

• Hold $50 worth of $SOSANA tokens
• Keep them in your wallet for the full 48-hour voting window

⸻

✅ Step 5: Cast Your Vote

• Go to the Voting section

⸻

🎁 If $CRM Wins

• Claim your airdrop allocation directly from the platform

16:05
Crypto Rug Muncher
Let's be real, there is no way, even on a cold day in hell, that Binance actually sues the WSJ over their report on sanctioned Iranian funds circulating through their exchange. If they did sue, this would mean having to reveal the inner workings of their entire operation publicly, in a court of law and under oath.

​The absolute last thing Binance wants right now is their internal plumbing exposed to the public, especially with the 10/10 scrutiny they're already under. A defamation case is a one-way ticket to discovery, where every "private" Slack message and internal memo becomes a public exhibit for the DOJ to later potentially scroll through.

​Threatening a lawsuit is one thing; actually opening the books for a judge is another. This isn’t a genuine legal strategy, it’s a total PR bluff with no intention or realistic way of following through.

17:37
Crypto Rug Muncher
🚀 $CRM IS UNSTOPPABLE!

If you blinked, you missed it. Less than 24 hours ago, $CRM was sitting at a $400k market cap. Today, we officially smashed through $500k and even pushed toward $600k earlier this afternoon! 📈

The market is finally waking up to the truth: $CRM is here to stay. While other projects are busy fleecing retail investors, we are building on their behalf. We aren’t just another token; we are actively developing the most advanced and accurate crypto security tool suite on the market to make the space a safer place for everyone.

🛠 The Proof is in the Building

We have already launched two tools in Beta:

• 🔍 Contract & Wallet Analysis Tool: Live now on Telegram.
• 🤖 @MarcusRugIntel: Our AI agent providing significantly deeper analysis, context and understanding regarding projects and the market than our Analysis Tool.

These apps are just the beginning. We are continuously working to improve and expand on them so that they eventually become the best the market has to offer. We are also working quickly to integrate what we've already built across the web, with mobile and desktop versions launching as soon as possible so even more in the space can use our tools and protect themselves.

$CRM is built by the community, for the community, to protect the community.

The masses are finally realizing that our project does what it says and is delivering on its promises. In a market full of empty hype, real utility eventually always wins the day, especially in conditions like these, where it's abundantly clear that most projects in the space aren't building anything at all except an exit plan for the team.

Support a project dedicated to making crypto a better and safer place to be for all involved. You’re still early. Get $CRM.
⭐ 1 ❤ 11

Meet Amaro, known as @mastod0n__ on X. He’s the brilliant developer building the security suite for the $CRM project while I focus on tracking scams and scammers. Please give him a follow and buy him a beer if he’ll let you!

​Amaro is a close friend of one of our largest holders and was luckily introduced to me through that connection. He has worked tirelessly during our lowest points without any expectation of payment or gain, even using his own funds to ensure everything functioned perfectly, simply for the love of the game.

​They say when you try to do good, you attract good people, and Amaro is proof of that. Thank you for your hard work and dedication to protecting the community and pushing our project forward. You are truly rich in heart, sir. You've been doing the good work of the people because it's good, and deserve recognition by the community for all the effort you've poured into it.

Crypto Rug Muncher
We need to take a long, hard look at the looters and rapers in our space and among us from this previous cycle and remember their faces and the details of their misdeeds before they fade into the shadows of the bear market. Make no mistake: if given the opportunity, these same extractors will be right back to their old tricks the moment the next cycle makes it convenient.

Those two idiots Kyle Davies and Su Zhu were prime examples; they had proven themselves incapable, incompetent and out of their depth at building anything that wasnt house of cards designed to collapse on everyone but themselves. We all learned this lesson the hard way when they drove 3AC into the ground, shouting "Super Cycle" while the ship was already underwater.

The fact that they both were warmly welcomed by many in the community to run multiple scams again this cycle is a collective failure. As an industry, we need a better memory. We must stop allowing obvious bad actors to return and instead collectively banish them forever once we know the score.

Hello @SenBlumenthal, while you are digging into these sanctions violations, I urge you to also demand a full accounting, backed by verifiable evidence, of Binance's role in the massive 10/10 liquidation event. Nearly $20 billion was wiped out in a single day, and while Binance is heavily implicated in the cascading failures, they continue to deny any culpability and refuse to present any evidence that proves their side of events.

Furthermore, you must investigate how Binance came to control nearly 90% of $USD1, the Trump family-backed stablecoin. This concentration of power occurred precisely as Changpeng Zhao (CZ) was being pardoned in October. The conflict of interest in this situation is staggering and deserves immediate congressional oversight.

Finally, you are asking the wrong person for answers here. Richard Teng is a puppet. CZ effectively runs the exchange despite being banned from doing so under his 2023 plea deal for anti-money laundering violations. Teng is simply a stand-in to circumvent court rulings on CZ’s leadership ban. If you want the truth, you need to force the the man actually running the show to speak, not the one pretending to.

Whether FTX was solvent is almost irrelevant; the crime really was the misappropriation of customer deposits. Sam’s fatal mistake was treating user funds as his own personal venture capital fund.

He was playing a game of catch up with money that didn't belong to him. If the bank run hadn't occurred, he likely would have eventually made more than enough to cover his tracks, but he ran out of time. The scheme collapsed before he could return to all his customers their money when they wanted it, and that’s why he’s writing to us all from a jail cell instead of the Bahamas.

13:55
Crypto Rug Muncher
You’d assume covering crypto scams would get quiet during a bear market. With less hype and fewer daily rugs popping off, it seems like there’d be nothing left to talk about.

Actually, the opposite is true.

This is when the real heavy lifting begins. When the easy money dries up, the massive, structural frauds finally start to unwind. While the pace of the market slows down, the gravity of the stories increases. While the market is slow we can shift coverage from chasing low-level exit scams to watching the biggest players in the space crumble under the weight of their own dirty dealings.

If anything, a downturn is the best time to be watching, it’s only when the tide goes out that you can see who’s been swimming naked the entire time.
❤ 6

Crypto Rug Muncher
Binance’s strategy every time a scandal breaks:

"We’ve investigated ourselves and found we did nothing wrong." 🤡

At this point, "trust us" is a dead currency. The only way Binance ever recovers an ounce of public credibility is by opening their books to a legitimate, independent third-party auditor and publishing the full, unredacted results.

The public doesn't want more infographics filled with unverifiable data and long-winded corporate jargon and excuses. Anything less than a transparent, comprehensive audit is just a PR script. We don't want excuses, we want receipts and we want them now.

15:48
Crypto Rug Muncher
The Binance Black Box: What It Is and Why It’s So Dangerous

The Binance Black Box isn’t a technical glitch. It’s a deliberate corporate architecture designed to keep you, the regulators, and the truth in total darkness. While every other exchange at least tries to look transparent, Binance spent years building an empire out of offshore entities to hide exactly how it handles the billions flowing through its system. If you think your money is safe because you saw a "Proof of Reserves" infographic, you’re really being played.

The most dangerous part of this box is the trading data. That massive volume you see every day is mostly a hall of mirrors. The SEC (Case 1:23-cv-01599) already caught them using Sigma Chain, an internal firm owned by CZ, to wash trade against their own users. They weren’t just providing liquidity; they were faking it to lure in retail traders who thought they were entering a hot market with real traders. When the house is buying and selling to itself, the "market price" is whatever they want it to be and they know your every move.

We saw the reality of this system during the 10/10 flash crash. When the market hit a wall, the "deep liquidity" Binance brags about vanished in seconds. $19 billion in retail positions were wiped out in a single afternoon. While the exchange claimed it was just a macro event, their own systems conveniently lagged for over 30 minutes while the liquidation engine kept grinding through user balances. When the referee is also the opposing team, you’ve already lost the game before it starts.

Your deposits on Binance aren't sitting in a vault somewhere. They’re in a pass-through account. Investigators first discovered evidence of this back in 2022, but by 2023 the SEC confirmed that over $20 billion flowed through a CZ-controlled shell company called Merit Peak. This included $11 billion in customer assets that were commingled with corporate cash between 2019 and 2021. This is the "paper crypto" model: your Bitcoin is just a digital IOU on a screen while the actual assets are being used to shore up risky corporate bets or fund luxury lifestyles, like the $11 million yacht cited in federal filings.

The most damning part of it all? What happens when an employee actually tries to do their job. On February 24, 2026, Senator Richard Blumenthal launched a formal inquiry into the $1.7 billion in laundered money that flowed to Iranian proxies and the Russian "Shadow Fleet" through Binance. The senior investigators who found this dirt didn’t get a promotion, they got fired. Binance calls it a "protocol violation," but we know what it really is: a purge of anyone who dares to look under the hood too deeply.

Binance will keep trying to spam the crypto community with infographics and jargon-heavy PR posts. But until they open their books to a real, independent, Big Four audit, the Black Box remains a trap for anyone who enters. The 10/10 crash proved it: when the panic hits and the system starts to buckle, you’ll realize the exit door at the world’s largest exchange was just painted on the wall and never really there to begin with.
❤ 5 👀 1

Crypto Rug Muncher
If you value our coverage and content on the crypto space, the best way to keep it alive is to like and share these posts.

Our reach on X has taken a massive hit recently. We were gaining some serious momentum, but the second I started mentioning the ties between the current administration and the crypto industry, the throttling felt immediate.

This is the second time our account has been buried like this. The first was last year when we were exposing similar political overlaps right at the start of the current administration.

It is a strange coincidence that the algorithm seems to "break" the moment we move from general market news to naming specific names in the government.

Your engagement is the only way to bypass these filters. If you want the raw, unfiltered realities of the crypto space, do not let the algorithm bury us.

Crypto Rug Muncher
The $CRM / $cryptorugmunch ecosystem just hit a massive milestone. Our suite of security extensions and our lead AI agent,
@MarcusRugIntel, have officially been approved by Coinbase.

What this actually means is simple: our tech is now a core part of the Coinbase ecosystem. We are fully integrated into their new agentic payment flow and API toolkit. This isn't just a "listing", it’s a direct move that allows our tools to manage and secure actual money moves within the Coinbase infrastructure.

We are major first movers here. While everyone else is still talking about "AI in crypto," we are already working with the biggest names in the game. By getting approved early, we’ve secured a seat at the table where the future of automated, agent-based payments are being written.

The era of blind trust is over. With @MarcusRugIntel and Coinbase working together, your agents finally have the intelligence to know exactly what they are interacting with before a single cent moves. We told you we were building the future of crypto security, now you’re seeing it happen in real-time.

Crypto Rug Muncher
Jane Street and Binance can both be market manipulators. The indictment of one does not suddenly absolve the other.

​Use your brains and stop listening to the way this is being spun to you.

​One is an offshore bucket shop exchange that avoided the law, and the other is a Wall Street powerhouse allegedly exploiting it.

If you think a crackdown on a crypto exchange suddenly cleans up the market while institutional firms are reportedly running predatory playbooks, you aren't paying attention.

​In this game, the house has many rooms, but they are all playing the same rigged game. Don't let headlines and the ulterior motives of others confuse you: they are both equally symbols of the complete rot in the crypto space.

🛡️ CRM Agent API — Status Update

Our x402 agent API is live and fully operational:

✅ 19 endpoints for AI agents to check tokens for rug pulls
✅ Free tier: 10 checks/day, no signup needed
✅ Paid: $0.02 – $2.00 per call via USDC (Base or Solana)
✅ MCP server for Claude Desktop, Cursor, etc.
✅ Just merged into the official Coinbase x402 ecosystem

What this means: Any AI trading bot can now check a token before buying — costs $0.04 per check. If the risk score is high, don't buy. Simple.

Try it yourself:
curl -X POST https://cryptorugmunch.app/api/agent/v1/check-risk \
-H "Content-Type: application/json" \
-d '{"token_address": "YOUR_TOKEN_HERE"}'

881K+ scans processed. 271K+ high-risk tokens flagged. 🗿

01:53
Crypto Rug Muncher
WLFI: The Art of the Steal

If you look at the World Liberty Financial $WLFI "Gold Paper" for more than five seconds, the stink of a rigged game is impossible to ignore. This isn’t just another typically bad and botched crypto launch; it’s a pre-designed exit door for the Trump family and their political inner circle to extract liquidity directly from the public.

They didn't even try to hide the grift, they use it in their promotion. Donald Trump serves as "Chief Crypto Advocate," while Eric, Don Jr., and Barron are installed as "Ambassadors" and "Visionaries." Behind the scenes, a Trump-owned entity holds 60% of the equity and is entitled to 75% of all net revenue. While the family grabbed a massive chunk of the supply for effectively zero cost, retail investors were lured into a "non-transferable" cage, unable to sell for nearly a year. Even with the 20% unlock this past September, the core mechanic remains unchanged: the public provides the price floor for a system hardcoded to pay the house first.

The real smoke rising these days is from the CZ pardon. You don’t get a pass on federal money-laundering charges for being a nice guy. You buy it. Right as the Binance founder was securing his freedom, his exchange was vacuuming up the WLFI-backed USD1 supply. On-chain data now shows Binance controls a staggering 87% of the total supply, which is roughly $4.7 billion. Both companies deny any wrongdoing, but the situation screams quid pro quo. It has effectively turned a supposedly decentralized stablecoin into a centralized slush fund for the Trump family and their political patrons.

This week’s new "governance staking" proposal is the latest slap in the face to their community. They’re asking you to lock your tokens for another 180 days to earn a pathetic 2% yield in more worthless WLFI. Think about the math: they want you to freeze your capital for six months in a volatile market for a tiny bit more of a shitcoin that insiders bought for fractions of a cent. It’s a transparent attempt to keep retail from selling while the team continues to extract value. They need your tokens off the market to keep the price propped up while the big players use their "Node" status to skim the real profits.

If you want to see who this protocol actually serves, look at the tiers. If you can stake 10 million WLFI (about $1 million right now), you become a "Node" with 1:1 conversion rights for USD1, capturing arbitrage profits that used to belong to the protocol. If you’re a "Super Node" with 50 million tokens, you get direct team access and a seat at the revenue-sharing table. This isn't decentralization; they've built a medieval tiered feudal system where the small holders get to eat crumbs off the floor and whales get the keys to the treasury.

The architecture of WLFI reveals a grim reality. The decentralized future they promised is just a digital version of the old-school smoke-filled room, specifically designed for the elite to conduct their business in peace. By the time any retail investor manages to exit their 180-day staking lock, the insiders will have already milked the protocol through lopsided revenue splits and backroom stablecoin deals. This isn’t a new financial system. It is a cynical, deliberate attempt to institutionalize political corruption on the blockchain and make it easier for those already in power to take money directly out of your pockets.
⭐ 101 🔥 5 ❤ 1

04:36
Crypto Rug Muncher
I want to congratulate the $CRM community on hitting the $600k milestone earlier today!

Why is $CRM moving? We are building the essential infrastructure to make this space safer and create a more informed class of crypto investors.

Our contract and wallet analysis tools are live and already protecting traders. By providing complete token breakdowns and comprehensive risk scores, we’re giving users the data they need to stay safe. Our AI agent, @MarcusRugIntel, is actively performing deep-dive analysis on tokens, holder distributions, even KOLs. Marcus has also been officially approved by Coinbase’s AI agent framework and is now being paid by other bots for his high-level analysis. We aren't just protecting humans; we’re front-running the future of crypto security.

We are constantly refining our tools to ensure they remain the most accurate on the market. While we have built this on a disciplined budget, we are selectively integrating high-impact features and premium APIs as we scale and can afford to do so. Our goal is simple: to offer the most comprehensive and accurate security suite available. We will get there, and it will be sooner than you think.

Thank you to the community for supporting the mission to help the entire crypto space know exactly what they hold. Get $CRM.

06:29
Amaro De Abreu
Just got home after a long ass day, and noticed the epic momentum and activity going in! Thank you all for the immense support.

I had been out, sitting with my literal engineering right hand man, Krisztian.

He is an ex-Wise platform engineer, and has jumped on board to help me balance out the workload and help us scale our tools and utilities with his vast experience.

In the real world, he is my go to guy and trusted advisor, and I am being straight up honest when I say he is epic, visionary, highly experienced and the perfect complement to my skill set, and we now have the privilege to have him supporting the cause and helping me achieve more, quicker, and to a high level.

He joined X a couple of days ago just to get aligned and start following the project while helping me with the dev ops and platform engineering, and you will be hearing his name, and me talking about him going forward.

Just to update everyone here, and to make him known to everyone here in the community, here is his X: https://x.com/kristiankoszegi?s=21

Another win for $CRM, with real world non crypto people seeing this is something different, and having another proper engineer helping out at the moment, as a personal favour to me, to the benefit of our project.
❤

08:26
Crypto Rug Muncher
Thank you to everyone engaging with the long-form content we’ve been producing over the last week. The overall reaction confirms what I’ve been hoping for: there is a clear and growing demand for thorough, regular reporting on the crypto scam landscape. This past week has served as a successful proof-of-concept for a major milestone we’ve had planned since the beginning: the launch of The Weekly Rug newsletter.

While critical security alerts and major reporting will always remain free, some of our comprehensive analysis will eventually move to an affordable subscription model. This isn’t about gatekeeping information from the community; it’s about scaling our research team to deliver the institutional-grade intelligence to the entire space on a weekly basis.

This growth will benefit the entire $CRM - $cryptorugmunch ecosystem. The newsletter will establish a reliable revenue stream and help to fund the technical advancement of our security suite, while our research continues to inform our daily reporting across all social channels. We are committed to keeping this accessible and affordable for all. $CRM holders will receive exclusive discounts, and public pricing will remain fair to ensure our reporting stays available to anyone who wants it.

Our mission is to arm the community with the security tools necessary for safe trading while providing the high-level reporting on industry bad actors that every market participant deserves to know about. This marks a strategic transition from tracking localized daily rugs to exposing the industry’s most prominent names and systemic risks. While we will continue to provide coverage of these smaller scams as they surface, our focus will also be shifting toward a more sophisticated and comprehensive analysis of the broader crypto landscape as we scale.

Continue to enjoy our deep dives and share your suggestions as we refine the content more and work to make it better ahead of the newsletter launch. I’ll provide an official update on the launch date once the final details are in place. Thank you for sticking with us as we work to up our game to expand on and improve the coverage we bring to you.
⭐ 1 ❤ 5

Crypto Rug Muncher
Just a few hours ago, I was congratulating the community on hitting $600k. Now, we’ve already cleared $800k. Name a better-looking chart in crypto right now than $CRM. I’ll wait.

It turns out that when you focus on building practical, useful tools that people actually need and want to use, broader market conditions simply don’t apply. Utility might be "boring" to some, but it provides far more long-term viability and value to a project than relying on hype alone.

Thank you to the $CRM community for teaching the rest of this space the valuable lesson that practical utility will always win over hype, even if it might take a bit of time for everyone else to finally catch on.

Crypto Rug Muncher
On a technical note since some of you have been asking, our Dexscreener page will soon be getting a fresh coat of paint to match the growth our project is seeing.

Currently, the page directs new users to our X Community group, but I’ll be updating that link to my profile moving forward. It’s important that anyone landing on our chart can immediately see the active development and content we’re showcasing on this account daily. I’ll also be updating the project logo to reflect our current official branding and giving the header image a much-needed overhaul.

This has been on the agenda for a while, but with the surge in interest and the volume of new eyes on $CRM, it is now a top priority. I’ll have this finalized for you all ASAP, if not by the end of today, then first thing tomorrow morning for certain.

16:12
Crypto Rug Muncher
You see $CRM pumping and you get that trigger finger itch because you’ve been scammed too many times before. In this space, everyone is used to being exit liquidity. We’re going to prove we’re different by doing one thing: delivering exactly what we say we will.

​Beyond the tech, we’re baking genuine rewards for early backers and original product users into the project design from the start. As the creator, I’ve used my position since day one to advocate for our holders and those supporting our development. I’ll continue to fight for the community to give you more as we build. Without you, we wouldn't exist, and it's only right you be rewarded for believing in us.

​We’re flipping the crypto script. We aren't here to extract value; we’re here to build and manage a successful project that rewards the entire community, not just those at the top. Our success only comes after we've kept our promises to you. If we do this right, our team will be more than fairly compensated for our hard work without relying on extraction from our community to achieve it.

​Building on behalf of your community and rewarding their loyalty is the easiest way to stand out in a sea of scams, yet no one is doing it, so we will. We have already delivered the initial launch of our security tool suite, completing much of the work well ahead of the roadmap deadlines. We aren't just hitting targets; we’re beating them.

​As long as I am running this project, I promise to keep advocating for sharing our success with the community and I will make sure it actually happens. If we do well, we all do well.

​We aren't here to imitate the tired, dated standards of this space. We’re here to be the new gold standard and a leading example of a better way forward for this industry, moving beyond the tired extraction model that has driven most retail investors away. We want to be the leading example of a new ethical and sustainable way to build. Keep watching and we'll keep proving that you've finally found a project doing crypto completely differently by designing and building a project with their holders completely first to mind. Stick around and help us prove that all the extractors in this space got it completely wrong.
⭐ 1 ❤ 14 🔥 2

22:04
Crypto Rug Muncher
Our Commitment to Independence

1. Editorial Integrity

We maintain absolute editorial independence over all content we publish. We do not accept payment to disparage projects or suppress information. In an industry filled with pay-to-play coverage, we believe neutrality is a currency that appreciates over time. We refuse to devalue the trust we’ve built for a quick payoff.

2. Why I Launched $CRM - $cryptorugmunch

One of the primary reasons for launching my project was to ensure I never had to become a lapdog for scammers just to put food on the table. By building my my own ecosystem, I've created enough financial freedom to cover bad actors without fear or favor. This project and its community are the leverage we hold to keep our reporting independent, honest, and free of outside influence. We shouldn't be easily willing to give that up.

3. Our Stance on Exchanges

We have intentionally kept power in the hands of the people rather than centralized entities. While we are open to CEX listings and have talked to a few, we will only accept offers that align with our and the community’s values.

We will never sacrifice project control for a short-term pump. It is never wise to surrender the keys to the castle while it is still being built. Many projects give up their supply and sovereignty too early, only to find themselves marginalized or dumped on by the very exchanges they trusted. We will not make that mistake.

4. Independent by Design

We are building essential tools for this space, and we will defend our autonomy at every turn. Our goal is to stay independent by design, ensuring that our work, our community, and our products remain protected from bad actors that seek to prioritize short-term profits over the people we are building for.

C
23:37
Crypto Rug Muncher
It is difficult to write this because, like many of us in the crypto scam niche, I have held nothing but respect for ZachXBT. He effectively built the blueprint for digital accountability, showing that a single analyst could dismantle multimillion-dollar syndicates. For a long time, he was the gold standard, the investigator who proved there was a massive community hungry for the truth.

However, the mission seems to have shifted lately, and not in a way that serves the space. The recent coverage of the Axiom Exchange insider trading allegations is a prime example of a veteran analyst losing sight of his impact or maybe being all too aware of it. Zach is far too experienced to be naive about market dynamics. By teasing a major investigation days in advance, in horrible market conditions, he did not just prepare the community; he inadvertently created a massive playground for the very manipulation he claims to fight.

We saw a $34 million Polymarket pool spring up around his teaser, where speculators raked in over $1 million by betting on the outcome of his report. In a market under strain, a high-profile reveal becomes its own asset class, and Zach likely knew that. This allowed insiders and exploiters to front-run the news, effectively creating a secondary market of insider trading built on the report itself.

While the Axiom case exposes an employee abusing data to profit, the actual amounts being discussed are figures I see rugged on a random Tuesday. It feels like a small fish is being presented as a whale while the larger institutional rot goes completely unaddressed by Zach.

The most concerning development, however, is the relationship with Binance. In November 2025, it was announced that Zach would be hired as a security guardian for the BNB Chain. While these are often framed as transparent grants, the silence since then has been telling. We are currently navigating some of the most complex scandals in that exchange's history, yet the industry’s top watchdog has been notably quiet on that front. It all seems very odd to me.

I never like to write up these kind of reports on people involved in the crypto security space because there really aren't very many of us, especially someone as normally respected as Zach. But I am not liking what I am seeing lately across multiple fronts. It appears the gold standard is being traded in for corporate retainers and high-profile teasers that fuel the very insider speculation he is claiming to stop. It is a disappointing turn of events and a setback for the crypto security space that someone whose word used to be truth to all ears is now someone we must question.
❤ 5 👀 2 🙈 1

Are you working for a crypto firm engaged in shady, corrupt, or non-compliant behavior? Are you sick of the seeing all the rot and ready to spill the beans?

We would love to hear from you. Absolute anonymity is guaranteed. All high-stakes discussions will be moved immediately to secure, end-to-end encrypted channels. We understand the personal and professional risks involved; we are prepared to work with any whistleblower to frame our reporting in a way that protects your identity while ensuring as much of the truth as possible reaches the public.

In an industry lacking oversight, transparency is the real weapon we have and we must start using it. Be an advocate for your industry and help us clean it up from the inside.

DM @CryptoRugMunch on X or Telegram and let’s get the conversation started.

17:33
Crypto Rug Muncher
Our Outline to Independence

We are making sure $CRM / $cryptorugmunch can’t be silenced. The current media landscape and social media environment are too volatile for us or anyone to rely on. We will soon be baking a fallback into the equation to protect our work and keep it free for the community. We’ll stay active on social media, but we won't be at their mercy. We are future-proofing our content so no algorithm or ban can kill the mission.

The Roadmap to Independence:

Self-Hosted Social Content: If our accounts ever go down, the truth stays up. We will soon be hosting our own social feed on the site so the receipts are always available to the community.

The Weekly Rug: Launching soon. This is our flagship for industry-grade deep analysis and reporting. It hits your inbox every week and stays archived on our site. Unfiltered intel the mainstream outlets won't touch.

Integrated Security Tools: We’re putting our core tech directly on the website. Don’t just trust our reporting, come to our website and use the tools we are building to see the threats yourself.

Transparency Dashboard: Coming later this year to track metrics like bot scans and DAO funding. Total transparency with zero gatekeepers.

The Snitch Board: A community-led space to expose and discuss scams and scammers in real-time and free of censorship.

We’re doing this because there’s a massive need for independent crypto news and analysis that isn't bought and paid for. There is is also a massive need for the security tools we are building. If they try to restrict the info, we host it ourselves to ensure all of it remains easily available to all who want to read and use it.

Support independent crypto media and the development of the next-gen of crypto security tools. Get $CRM.

00:24
Crypto Rug Muncher
I've have had a few complaints from community members about the direction our content has taken lately, so I want to be straight with everyone about the reality of where this market is going.

The easiest thing for me to do and honestly the safest move for my personal security would be to just keep our heads down, stick to the app suite, and churn out daily rug reports. It’s a comfortable lane. But let’s be real: that entire category of content goes dead and gone the second a true bear market hits. When the hype evaporates, the audience for it vanishes.

We also cannot rely on building security tools alone. If the market is dead, no one is around to use them. To stay relevant and actually lead, we have to fill the massive void that exists right now. This space is starving for independent media and an unfiltered look at the reality of what’s happening in crypto. People need the biggest stories covered without a hidden agenda, paired with the best security tools possible so they can actually protect themselves.

We are providing our audience with two things they desperately need right now. Our content informs the community on the most important stories in the crypto space while our tools provide the actual ability to keep them safe.

We aren’t interested in just being another project calling out the latest shitcoins anymore. The market demands actual substance and we are pivoting to meet that demand. This shift is how we bring real eyes to both the content and the software we are building and real value to our holders. We are moving from providing temporary hype commentary to providing the analysis and tools that make us a permanent fixture in the space.

We hope the community appreciates this move and realizes that this is definitely not the path of least resistance. We are taking the harder route because it is what the space actually demands and needs, and it is the only way to build a project that holds true, lasting value for everyone involved.
⭐ 1 ❤ 9 👏 5

03:35
Crypto Rug Muncher
I can’t control the markets, and I won’t tell you how to manage your capital. But before you look at the "Sell" button, I’d urge you to look at the building.

While the rest of the space is drowning in doom and despair, $CRM is heads-down, engineering the tools that will protect the industry's future.

Why $CRM is the Outlier:

The Future of Crypto Security (Live Now)

We aren’t selling roadmaps or vague promises. We are delivering. Our core apps are live in beta for the community right now, and we are refining them every single day. In an industry defined by risk, we aren't just identifying the problems, we're building a shield for the space against them.

The Independent Media Pivot

When the markets bleed, people don't stop looking at their screens, they look for answers. While every other project hits the 'mute' button and ghosts their community during a bear market, we will be turning the volume up.

Our goal is to become a widely respected and known source for reliable and independent coverage on the crypto space. Most teams crumble into radio silence the moment the hype dies, but we’re staying high-visibility, delivering the detailed analysis this space demands.

By owning the conversation while others fade into irrelevance, $CRM stays top-of-mind. We won't be just weathering the bear market; we will be defining it.

Weatherproof Value

Candles turn red, but the need for security and honest information is permanent. $CRM is the engine behind tools and media that provide lasting value, regardless of whether the market is pumping or dumping.

The Bottom Line

It is incredibly rare to find a project that cares enough about its holders to plan for the bear market, let alone one with a strategy to survive and thrive during it.

You’ve found the builders. You've found a team with a plan. You've found a great community. Why not stick around?

Get $CRM

Crypto Rug Muncher
As I’ve been telling my community lately: we are one geopolitical disaster or major insolvency away from a deep bear market. The thing about bear markets is that just when you think things are bad, they get significantly worse. In crypto, it’s far better to plan for a contingency you hope never happens than to be caught off guard when it does. Prepare for the market we are likely in, not the one you wish we were in.

05:34
Crypto Rug Muncher
I want to be very clear on the $CRM price action: If the team isn’t dumping, our largest stakeholders are holding, and we are consistently shipping updates and content, then the volatility you see is likely just a rogue whale or two messing with the chart. It’s noise, not a signal or a reason for concern.

The dev team and the many of our top holders in this project are completely aligned. We have zero interest in selling during the development phase because we know the intrinsic value of what we’re building. I’ve made my stance clear in our large-holder community chat: we are here to build, not to play price games. The vast majority of our largest holders, the ones who have held this project down since the very early days, are 100% in agreement with that vision.

While I can’t control everyone’s sell button, you can trust the work we put in every single day. We are focused on scaling this project so that soon, our community will be so large that the actions of a couple of whales won't move the needle like they do right now. Get $CRM, tell others about what we are building, and make it come to be.

07:29
Crypto Rug Muncher
Prediction markets get sold as some high-level tool for "collective intelligence," but in reality, they are just a legal loophole for people in power to cash out on their own secrets. If you can bet on a policy you are writing, a scam you are covering, or a conflict you are starting, you aren't predicting anything. You are just profiting from a result you already control. It is insider trading with better marketing, allowing the people who run the show to get paid for the outcomes they create.

The real danger is that these markets actually change the way decisions get made. It creates a rigged cycle where the financial incentive overrides everything else. When you create a market for a specific outcome, you give everyone with the power to influence that outcome a massive reason to force it through. It stops being about the best move for the country and starts being about the best move for the trade. If an official stands to make a fortune on a specific event, they will push for the policies that guarantee they get paid.

In this environment, being honest is a liability because every move is tied to a payout. These platforms give people a way to turn their private information into personal wealth without it looking like a bribe or a crime. It is a clean way to launder insider knowledge into a bank account under the guise of market data. Once there is a price tag on every decision, the public interest is always the first thing to get sold out for the sake of the portfolio.

This turns the entire system into a private hedge fund where the house doesn’t just pick the winners, they write the script. They bet on the ending before the public even knows the game has started. Prediction markets aren't some innovation for the future; they are a tool for corruption that is actively making society worse. They are a rigged casino where the people in charge are betting against the people they are supposed to serve, and they are winning because they own the board.

01:33
Crypto Rug Muncher
Prediction markets are sleepwalking into a massive legal reckoning. They love to hide behind the "neutral platform" label, but the reality is they are the ultimate gatekeepers because they control the listings. When you decide what the world bets on, you own the ethical and legal risk that comes with it.

A responsible exchange would have a team dedicated to "red-teaming" every single listing, conceiving of every possible way a government staffer, a court clerk, or a corporate executive could rig the outcome before it ever goes live. If you aren't actively hunting for those exploits, you aren't just a venue; you’re a facilitator in insider trading.

By failing to account for these obvious vulnerabilities, these platforms are effectively setting up markets engineered for abuse. They aren't just "hosting" a bet on a Supreme Court ruling or a legislative vote; they are hand-delivering a gold mine to the insiders who control the results.

When the regulators finally drop the hammer, "we just provide the tech" won't be a valid defense. You can't claim innocence when your own team spent years hand-picking the games and leaving the back door wide open for the elite to dump on everyone else.

We don't hate these companies enough.

01:56
Crypto Rug Muncher
If you want to help clean up the crypto industry, stop pretending that disclosures for formal ads are enough. That’s just window dressing for regulators and isn't where the actual scammers on this site operate.

The real damage isn't happening in the ads. It’s happening in the feed, pushed to the community daily by your own algorithm. Right now, hundreds of KOLs are dumping on their followers every day through undisclosed promotions, disguised as alpha but really just paid, secret investment advice.

Nobody is protected by a "Sponsored" tag that only shows up on a formal ad. If you want to stop the most common type of scam on your site, you have to require disclosure for every financial or crypto-related promotion, no matter where it appears on X, and then actually do something about it when those rules are ignored.

11:20
Crypto Rug Muncher
Firms like Coinbase, Crypto com, Robinhood, and even the Trump family’s Truth Predict platform are scrambling to own prediction markets because they’ve found a massive, unregulated loophole. Right now, there is basically zero oversight, allowing these companies to build the plumbing for a high-stakes exchange where the elite can trade on secrets. Because there are no real rules, they can launch contracts that are incredibly easy for insiders to manipulate, turning private information into a tradable commodity before it ever hits the news.

We are already seeing the data back this up. Anonymous accounts have walked away with millions by placing perfectly timed bets just hours before major military strikes, corporate mergers, or sudden political shifts. These aren't lucky guesses; they are trades made by people who clearly know what’s coming. Whether it’s a conflict in the Middle East, a raid on a foreign leader, or a private boardroom deal, insiders are using these platforms to cash out on their secrets while regular people are lured in to provide the exit liquidity.

These companies are effectively looking the other way while insiders rig the game. They provide the venue, create the easily manipulated markets, and take a cut of the high-volume trading while dressing it up as "public intelligence." In reality, they are running a machine that rewards the people who already hold all the cards. Without immediate and aggressive regulation, these platforms are just a legal cover for the elite to monetize and change reality at everyone else's expense.
❤ 3 👍 3

12:02
Crypto Rug Muncher
The crypto community was looking for a savior; the Trump family was just looking for a new line of credit and saw an easy mark.

I’ve spent a lot of time putting this together because its important that people know the reality is much darker and uglier than the "pro-crypto" headlines suggest. My new piece, The Great Crypto Heist, is a full breakdown of how the industry didn't just get a seat at the table, it got taken over.

The article goes over all the moves that got us here: from secret half-billion-dollar deals with foreign royals to the cynical policy changes that traded away the industry's independence for a family revenue split.

If you want to understand how a movement built on decentralization became a private family ATM, and see exactly how they turned the entire crypto industry into a family grift, you need to read this.

C
12:59
Crypto Rug Muncher
It looks like people are finally realizing you can't win a game where the odds are 99% against you. You can only rob retail for so long before they catch on. We’re seeing a massive drop in meme volume as everyone leaves the room; traders are waking up to the fact that these markets weren't built for them to win, they were built to harvest their liquidity. The trencher era is dying because the math doesn't add up anymore. When the game is rigged for the house, the only way to win is to stop playing.

The numbers back this up: data from CoinMarketCap and Dune Analytics shows meme dominance in the alt market plummeted from 11% to just 3% by the end of 2025. According to Glassnode’s 2025 Market Trend Reports, trading volume has shed nearly 65% from its peak as capital flows back into stocks and stable assets. People are tired of being the exit liquidity for insiders and whales using wash trades to fake demand. The party is over, and it was all the rigging that finally drove everyone away.

Crypto Rug Muncher
People often ask, "Where are the retail investors?"

The answer is simple: when retail hears the word "crypto," they don't think of innovation or the future of finance. They think of this:

Rug Pull
Pig Butchering
Pump and Dump
Ponzi Scheme
Vaporware
Wash Trading
REKT
Bagholder
Wallet Drainer
Sim-Swapping
Recovery Scam
Dusting Attack
Paid Shilling
Degen Gambling
Stablecoin De-pegging
Exchange Collapse
Exit Liquidity
Seed Phrase Theft
Phishing Attack
Fake Airdrop
Influencer Scam
Malicious Link
Bot Manipulation
Market Rigging
Ghost Project
Total Loss
Shitcoin
Bear Trap
Liquidation
Honeypot Trap

We have to strip these words from the public lexicon and replace them with a solid foundation of products and services, beyond crime, that the broader public wants and needs to use. Taking meaningful steps like these will slowly change the perception of the industry with time. It won't happen overnight, but this is where we start.

If you still think prediction markets are just a harmless way for the public to forecast the future, you have have been sold a lie and you are missing the most dangerous part of the story. These platforms have quietly morphed into a legalized way for government insiders and the ultra-wealthy to monetize state secrets long before they hit the news cycle.

When a random account clears $600k + on an airstrike hours before the first explosion, you aren’t witnessing a lucky guess or a smart algorithm. You are watching a system designed to let the powerful front-run us all.

If you're using these platforms, this isn't just "news", it is a direct threat to your capital. These unregulated markets are warping the very reality you trade in, allowing the people who actually make the news to cash in on it before you even see the headline.

While retail is busy analyzing charts, the people behind the curtain are using these platforms to turn classified information into massive financial gain. Our breakdown explains exactly how the game is rigged and why you need to understand this shadow economy before you become the exit liquidity for the most powerful insiders in the world.

17:26
Crypto Rug Muncher
Why aren't prediction markets regulated? The crypto industry doesn't want them to be.

The CFTC is supposed to stop market manipulation. Instead, they’ve built a sham "Innovation Advisory Committee" where the industry writes its own rules.

This framework is a total scam. They’ve packed the room with CEOs from Polymarket, Kalshi, Coinbase, and Robinhood to provide "oversight", the exact people who profit from the lax rules they’re creating.

By claiming "exclusive jurisdiction," they’ve blocked state oversight and green-lit markets custom-built for insider trading. It’s a closed-loop system designed to turn the public into exit liquidity for people who see the news before it happens.

Look through these names. I am very much certain these industry ghouls are giving the absolute best advice they can to keep these markets free of insider meddling and fair to the public.

05:01
Amaro De Abreu
New Commands

/toplist [1h|6h|24h|7d] [all|risky|safe|extreme]

• Ranked by scan volume (most scanned tokens first)
• Risk icons: 🔴 (extreme ≥80), 🟠 (high ≥60), 🟡 (medium ≥30), 🟢 (low)
• Wash detection: 🚨 if >5 scans per unique user (indicator of bot activity)
• Shows: users, scan count, risk score, liquidity
• /top is an alias

Example:

📋 *Toplist — 24H (RISKY)*

 1. 🔴 GOAT     (SOL)
    👥  1 users | 📊   1 scans | ⚠️ 100/100 | 💧 $0K

 2. 🔴 GUT      (SOL)
    👥  1 users | 📊   1 scans | ⚠️ 100/100 | 💧 $0K

All Systems Green ✅

• rug-munchy-bot: /toplist command live, /top alias working

16:01
Crypto Rug Muncher
The Trump administration has turned prediction markets into a private playground for insiders. By stripping away federal oversight and letting the industry self regulate the government has essentially legalized market manipulation for the well connected. This isn’t an accident or a glitch. It is a self sustaining circuit of corruption by design.

Think about how ridiculous this is: the industry gets to write its own lax rules, create markets that are easy for the powerful to rig, and then watch as those markets are exploited by the very people who gave them the power to regulate themselves in the first place. When the government lets the casino write its own rulebook the public loses every time.

It gets even worse. Donald Trump Jr. is currently an advisor for both Kalshi and Polymarket which are the two biggest players in the space. Why would he ever want these platforms to change their broken systems when the current setup perfectly benefits his political allies in government?

It is a closed loop where the people making the laws can leak info to move the markets and the platforms have zero incentive to stop it.

Why would prediction markets ever want to change when the people benefiting the most are the ones who gave the industry the power to ignore the rules? You need to read this to see the reality of how this industry is actually being run versus the fair market lie they are trying to sell to the public.

https://x.com/CryptoRugMunch/status/2028390902201295069
⭐ 2 ❤ 2
C
16:53
Crypto Rug Muncher
The crypto industry has a massive problem: it never built anything useful.

After a decade and billions in funding, most projects are just hollow shells with no real users. Insiders and VCs are sitting on mountains of tokens they can’t sell because there is no one left to buy them.

This is where the Trump alliance comes in.

Backing Trump was never about "adoption" or "innovation." What the industry wanted was to use deregulation as a weapon. They weren't looking for a better future; they were looking for a get out of jail free card to turn the market into a lawless extraction zone.

The Strategy:

The Smoke Screen: Use Trump’s platform to pump the market one last time. Convince a fresh wave of retail investors that "the bull run is back."

The Looting: While the public is distracted by the hype, the insiders offload their worthless tokens onto the new buyers.

The Exit: Once they’ve cashed out into real dollars, they don’t care if the industry burns. They’ve already stripped the copper from the walls.

They didn't hand Trump the keys to the industry because they trusted his driving skills. They handed them over because they knew he’d likely drive the car off a cliff, and they plan to jump out with the money before it hits the ground and explodes.
❤ 6
C(
17:04
CaptainACKE (Never DM You First)
In reply to this message
There’s truth in that.

When hype becomes the product, liquidity events are the only exit.

But that’s not a crypto issue, it’s a structure issue.

If insiders control the edge, speculation turns into extraction.

Fix the structure, and you don’t need manufactured hype cycles to survive.

🔍 Token Scanner

Usage: /scan <token_address>

Crypto Rug Muncher
The media and crypto industry are selling a fairy tale about 10/10, framing it as a simple macro correction triggered by a Trump tariff tweet. They’ve pinned the damage at a clean $19.3 billion and expected us to just move on. They’re lying. That figure is barely the visible tip of the iceberg, and the real story has nothing to do with geopolitical headlines.

The reality is far more predatory and sinister. While the world was distracted by the political noise, the industry itself was busy executing a massive wealth transfer from retail investors to the inner circle. My report deconstructs the oracle gaps, synthetic death loops, and the structural triggers that turned a standard dip into a systematic harvest of 1.6 million retail accounts.

10/10 marked the symbolic birth of a new and darker era for crypto, one where the tech itself has been weaponized into a liquidity trap, and seen the space redesigned as an exclusive playground for the elite.

The most comprehensive and detailed report ever written on the 10/10 liquidation event drops soon. Stay tuned.

11:13
Crypto Rug Muncher
Deep diving into the 10/10 liquidation event led me to the funniest "scammer getting scammed" lore in history.

Justin Sun, the king of the exit dump, got embarrassingly out-maneuvered and completely rekt by the Trumps.

Sun served as the primary bankroll for World Liberty Financial (WLFI), dropping a massive $75M investment into the project. He likely assumed that as the lead financier, he’d be the one pulling the strings. But the moment he tried to shuffle $9M toward his own exchange to prep for a typical dump, they hit him with the ultimate Uno reverse.

The team leveraged the centralized powers baked into their own smart contract to blacklist his entire wallet.

To this day, those tokens remain frozen. Sun is sitting there helpless, watching over $60M in losses stack up in real-time while the price craters. The man who built an entire career on using retail as exit liquidity has been transformed into the world’s most expensive bagholder, and the Trumps haven't shown a shred of mercy or concern.

Crypto insiders are quickly learning that they aren't nearly as good at the grifting game as they thought. You simply cannot out-scam the people who literally wrote the book on it. Sun finally met his match when he decided to do business with the Trump's, and he certainly won't be the last one to learn this lesson the hard way.

When you put a price tag on catastrophe, you aren’t just "predicting" it, you’re monetizing it. These markets are reckless and wide open to manipulation by the very people with their fingers on the buttons.

One market being removed doesn't fix the fact that we've turned human extinction into a prop bet. It’s time that we reign in on these platforms before they get us all killed.

🗿 Marcus v2.1

Big update to Marcus today.

He now tags every claim with its source. [ON-CHAIN] means he checked the blockchain. [API] means scan data. [USER-CLAIM] means someone in chat said it and he hasn't verified it yet. No more parroting hearsay as fact.

Scans show what he checked and what he didn't. Transparency, not theater.

He tracks his own predictions now. Flags a token as high risk, we check later if it actually rugged. Real accuracy numbers coming soon.

Investigations link together. Same deployer launched 3 dead tokens? Marcus connects the dots and tells you which case file it matches.

Conviction levels on analysis. If he's 90% sure, he says so. If he's guessing, he says that too.

Writing is tighter. Less bot, more analyst.

Same Marcus. Less bullshit.

23:01
Crypto Rug Muncher
The official account of 10-10 is a lie.

While headlines dismissed the crash as a reaction to trade tariffs, the data suggests a calculated execution. On-chain evidence indicates that over $40 billion was stripped from 1.6 million retail traders, a figure that dwarfs official industry estimates. The event wasn't a just a typical market correction; it was a clinical and cynical transfer of wealth facilitated by a $1.1 billion short opened on Hyperliquid exactly sixty seconds before the collapse, timed perfectly to exploit a 43-day government shutdown that left federal watchdogs sidelined.

New revelations from the 2026 Terraform Labs trial finally connect the dots. Evidence suggests that firms like Jane Street spent years using "10 AM dump" algorithms to maintain a state of manufactured fragility. When the trap was finally sprung, the infrastructure itself turned predatory. Binance utilized internal price silos to drive assets like ATOM and IOTX to zero while they traded normally elsewhere, allowing for the surgical seizure of collateral from perfectly solvent users.

Between the administration’s use of WLFI kill switches on their own token and the trading of accountability for political pardons, the dream of decentralization has been replaced by a corporately captured wasteland. The retail investors who built this industry have been effectively locked out by the very ecosystem they helped to create.

We are providing the most detailed account of these events to date, specifically so retail investors can see beyond the industry spin and get an accurate understanding of how it all took place and how they got played. Read our full autopsy for the story on 10/10 that the industry never wants you to see—and the event that changed the crypto industry forever.

The Clarity Act is a calculated corporate power grab masquerading as economic progress. While the administration uses populist rhetoric to promise that everyday investors will "earn more on their money," the legislation is meticulously engineered to favor the massive crypto firms and political insiders who bankrolled the movement.

A predictable pattern defines this administration's legislative agenda: wrapping bills in the flag of "innovation" while embedding complex exemptions in the fine print that only the largest players can exploit. In the crypto world, this translates to a legal green light for Trump-linked ventures and giant exchanges to function as shadow banks. These entities use "reward" schemes to bypass interest bans while dodging the fundamental safety rules that actually protect your savings. Ultimately, the goal is not market clarity for the public, but regulatory immunity for a select few—shifting the risk of a financial meltdown onto the American taxpayer while insiders walk away with the profits.
